subcodes.first_line: O God of Names and Creator of earth and heaven! I beseech Thee by the hearts which have been enkindled with the fire of Thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اله الاسماء و فاطر الارض و السماء اسئلک بالقلوب التی اشتعلت من نار حبک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God
